title: How Monday is used by two companies
excerpt: I am a manager at a small company which uses the Monday day, but we also have a larger vendor who uses the Monday day as well. It would be helpful if you could let me know if the user I am inviting already has a Monday a…

posts.author: jackiechain (Elon Musk)
posts.cookedHtml: I am a manager at a small company which uses the Monday day, but we also have a larger vendor who uses the Monday day as well. It would be helpful if you could let me know if the user I am inviting already has a Monday account, will that affect the number of guests and users I am allowed to invite. For example, it has been confirmed that three guests can be counted as one user.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jackiechain !

I might suggest if you are working with two companies to upgrade to Pro. Pro unlocks a lot of capabilities within monday and you get the bonus of being able to have unlimited Guests.

Hope this helps!
